zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Von Hessen於大約1323年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格時，她的父親Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen25歲，母親Elisabeth von Meissen18歲。她於1341年10月4日與Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年3月7日在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Von Hessen于大约1323年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格时，她的父亲Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen25岁，母亲Elisabeth von Meissen18岁。她于1341年10月4日与Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年3月7日在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna.  Scandinavian Hjalmer.

habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (German Hessen), a region (present-day federal state) in Germany named with the German dative plural form of the name of its inhabitants, the Hessians. Compare Hess 1.

variants.name: Haessig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reiner.
habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse, from the adjectival form of its German name (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hesser
meanings: nickname for a chaser at a hunt, from an agent derivative of Middle High German hessen ‘to hound’.
habitational name for someone from Hesse (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hess
meanings: German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (see   Hessen   1).
South German: from a short form of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hesso, a derivative of a compound name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as the first element, or from a pet form of Herman or Hendrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ivo  , derived from the oblique case of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Von Hessen was born about 1323, in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, her father, Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen, was 25 and her mother, Elisabeth von Meissen, was 18. She married Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen on 4 October 1341. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 7 March 1390, in Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Von Hessen est née environ 1323, à Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Meissen, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen le 4 octobre 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mars 1390, à Göttingen, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Von Hessen um 1323 in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen 25 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Meissen 18. Sie hat am 4. Oktober 1341 Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. März 1390 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland.

Lei sposato Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen il 4 ottobre 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 marzo 1390, nel Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Von Hessenが約1323年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグで生まれた時，父Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessenは25歳，母Elisabeth von Meissenは18歳であった。1341年10月4日にErnst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年3月7日にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーグoッティンジェンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Von Hessen(이)가 대략 1323년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Meissen(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1341년 10월 4일 Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 3월 7일 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 그o틴겐에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Von Hessen nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Meissen, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen em 4 de outubro de 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de março de 1390, em Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Von Hessen родилась около 1323 г. в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Meissen, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen 4 октября 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 7 марта 1390 г. в местности гoттинген, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Von Hessen nació aproximadamente 1323, en Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Meissen, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen el 4 de octubre de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1390, en Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 68 años.
